---
title: "Intro to Statistics"
subtitle: "Public course resources"
toc: false
---

This site collects public-facing resources for **Intro to Statistics** —
concepts, activities, and small reproducible R examples curated by
[Matt Hester](https://matthewhester.com).

It is a **curated resource site**, not a raw course archive. Anything
syllabus- or roster-specific lives in the LMS; this site is what stays
public.

## Where to start

- [Syllabus](syllabus.qmd) — course goals, structure, and policies
  (sanitized for public view)
- [Schedule](schedule.qmd) — week-by-week topic map
- [Notes](notes/index.qmd) — lecture notes and conceptual write-ups
- [Activities](activities/index.qmd) — in-class activities and worked
  examples
- [Assignments](assignments/index.qmd) — homework and lab descriptions
- [Projects](projects/index.qmd) — small open-ended projects
- [Resources](resources/index.qmd) — readings, R primers, and links
